page_metadata.bioconda__summary: DIALIGN-TX is a greedy and progressive approaches for segment-based multiple sequence alignment.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: DIALIGN-TX is an update to DIALIGN. It combines the greedy heuristic method of DIALIGN with a traditional progressive method.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DIALIGN-TX is an update to DIALIGN. It combines the greedy heuristic method of DIALIGN with a traditional progressive method.
